to.title: Mercy Seat Atonement
to.body: # Mercy Seat / Hilasterion → Christ Our Propitiation ## OT Story — Exodus 25:17-22; Leviticus 16:14-15 Over the ark sits the kapporet, the mercy seat, flanked by two cherubim. Once a year the high priest sprinkles blood there for the sins of the people. ## NT Fulfillment - Romans 3:25: God put forward Christ as a propitiation (hilasterion). - Hebrews 9:5: The cherubim of glory overshadowing the me…

from.title: Mountain Throughout Scripture
from.body: # Mountain Throughout Scripture ## NT Text — Heb 12; Matt 5; Rev 21 Mountains structure the canon: Eden's high garden, Moriah, Sinai, Zion, the Mount of Transfiguration, Mount of Olives, the heavenly Mount Zion. ## OT Antecedents - **Gen 22** — Moriah. - **Exod 19** — Sinai. - **2 Sam 5:7** — Zion. - **Ezek 28:14** — Holy mountain of God. ## Shared structure - Ascent - Theophany - Covenant - Sacri…

to.title: Revelation 21 New Jerusalem Descending
to.body: # Revelation 21: New Jerusalem Descending ## NT Text — Rev 21:1-22:5 John sees the new heaven and new earth and the New Jerusalem descending from heaven as a bride adorned. God dwells with men. ## OT Antecedents - **Isa 65:17-25** — New heavens and new earth. - **Ezek 40-48** — Vision of restored temple-city. - **Zech 8:3** — I will dwell in Zion. ## Shared structure - New cosmos - City descending…

from.title: Isaiah 9 Child Is Born
from.body: # Isaiah 9 / 'For Unto Us a Child Is Born' → Eternal King ## OT Story — Isaiah 9:6-7 'A child is born, a son is given; the government shall be upon his shoulder. His name shall be called Wonderful Counselor, Mighty God, Everlasting Father, Prince of Peace.' ## NT Fulfillment - Luke 1:32-33: He will be great and called Son of the Most High; his kingdom no end. - Luke 2:11: Born this day a Savior, C…

to.title: Voice From Heaven Beloved Son
to.body: # Voice from Heaven: Beloved Son ## NT Text — Matt 3:17; 17:5 At baptism and transfiguration the Father declares, 'This is my beloved Son.' The formula fuses Psalm 2's royal coronation with Isaiah 42's Servant and possibly Genesis 22's 'only/beloved son.' ## OT Antecedents - **Ps 2:7** — Royal son begotten today. - **Isa 42:1** — Chosen in whom my soul delights. - **Gen 22:2** — Take your son, you…

from.title: Twelve
from.body: # Twelve The number of the covenant people — twelve tribes, twelve apostles, twelve gates of the New Jerusalem. ## Biblical occurrences - Genesis 35:22-26; 49 — twelve sons of Jacob → twelve tribes - Exodus 24:4 — twelve pillars at Sinai - Joshua 4 — twelve stones from the Jordan - 1 Kings 18:31 — Elijah's twelve stones on Carmel - Matthew 10:1-4 — twelve apostles - Revelation 7:4-8; 21:12-14 — 12…

to.title: Jacobs Twelve Sons
to.body: # Jacob's Twelve Sons → The Twelve Tribes and the Twelve Apostles ## OT Story — Genesis 29-30; 49 Through Leah, Rachel, and their handmaids, Jacob fathers twelve sons. In Genesis 49 he blesses each, prophesying tribal destinies. ## NT Fulfillment - Matthew 19:28: The twelve will sit on twelve thrones judging the tribes. - Revelation 21:12-14: The New Jerusalem bears the names of the twelve tribes …

from.title: 1 Peter 2 He Bore Our Sins
from.body: # 1 Peter 2: He Bore Our Sins ## NT Text — 1 Pet 2:21-25 Christ left an example; he himself bore our sins in his body on the tree, that we might die to sin and live to righteousness. Isaiah 53 is paraphrased throughout. ## OT Antecedents - **Isa 53:4-6** — He bore our griefs; by his wounds we are healed. - **Isa 53:7** — Silent like a lamb. - **Isa 53:11** — Bear their iniquities. ## Shared struct…

to.title: Garden Of Gethsemane As Eden Reversed
to.body: # Garden of Gethsemane as Eden Reversed ## NT Text — Matt 26:36-46; John 18:1 Jesus enters a garden to face the will of his Father. Where Adam in the garden chose his own will and brought death, the last Adam chooses the Father's will and accepts death to bring life. ## OT Antecedents - **Gen 2-3** — Eden — the garden of disobedience. - **Gen 3:17-19** — Toil and sweat as curse. - **2 Sam 15:23** …

from.title: Darkness Over Land
from.body: # Darkness Over the Land ## NT Text — Matt 27:45 Darkness covers the land from noon to three. The cosmic sign echoes the ninth Egyptian plague and Amos's day-of-the-Lord. ## OT Antecedents - **Exod 10:21-23** — Three days darkness over Egypt. - **Amos 8:9** — Sun goes down at noon. - **Joel 2:31** — Sun turned to darkness. ## Shared structure - Daylight extinguished - Cosmic mourning - Plague echo…

to.title: Earthquake And Saints Raised
to.body: # Earthquake and Saints Raised ## NT Text — Matt 27:51-53 An earthquake splits rocks; tombs open; saints are raised after Jesus' resurrection. Eschatological first-fruits. ## OT Antecedents - **Ezek 37** — Dry bones live. - **Dan 12:2** — Sleepers in dust awake. - **Zech 14:4-5** — Earthquake on day of the LORD. ## Shared structure - Earthquake - Tomb-opening - Resurrection - Public witness ## The…

from.title: Triumphal Entry Donkey Zechariah
from.body: # Triumphal Entry on a Donkey ## NT Text — Matt 21:1-11; Zech 9:9 Jesus enters Jerusalem riding a donkey, fulfilling Zechariah's oracle of the humble king. Crowds spread cloaks and palms as for a Davidic king, blending Solomon's coronation and the Maccabean palms. ## OT Antecedents - **Zech 9:9** — Your king comes humble, riding on a donkey. - **1 Kgs 1:33-40** — Solomon rides David's mule to his …

to.title: Zechariah 14 Day Of The LORD
to.body: # Day of the LORD / Feet on the Mount of Olives → Christ Returns ## OT Story — Zechariah 14:1-9 'On that day his feet shall stand on the Mount of Olives, which is east of Jerusalem, and the mount shall be split in two… The LORD will be king over all the earth. On that day the LORD will be one and his name one.' ## NT Fulfillment - Acts 1:11-12: Angels say Jesus will return as he went; the place wa…

from.title: Pauls First Missionary Journey
from.body: # Paul's First Missionary Journey ## NT Text — Acts 13-14 Paul and Barnabas, sent by the Antioch church, take the gospel to Asia Minor synagogues. The Jew-first, then Gentile pattern is established. ## OT Antecedents - **Isa 49:6** — Light to nations — Paul cites it. - **Joel 2:32** — Whoever calls on the name. - **Hab 1:5** — Behold and wonder — Paul preaches it. ## Shared structure - Sending by …

to.title: Sauls Damascus Conversion
to.body: # Saul's Damascus Conversion ## NT Text — Acts 9:1-19 Saul is blinded by a light from heaven and hears 'why do you persecute me?' The persecutor becomes apostle; Sinai-theophany shape meets prophetic call. ## OT Antecedents - **Exod 3:1-6** — Burning bush call of Moses. - **Isa 6:1-8** — Isaiah's throne-vision call. - **Jer 1:4-10** — Jeremiah's prophetic call. ## Shared structure - Light from hea…

from.title: Psalm 110 Priest King
from.body: # Psalm 110 / 'Sit at My Right Hand' → Priest-King Forever ## OT Story — Psalm 110 'The LORD says to my Lord: Sit at my right hand until I make your enemies your footstool… You are a priest forever after the order of Melchizedek.' ## NT Fulfillment - Matthew 22:41-46: Jesus' messianic riddle from this psalm. - Hebrews 5:6; 7:1-28: Christ's eternal priesthood after Melchizedek. - Acts 2:34-36: Pete…

to.title: Psalm 40 Body Prepared
to.body: # Psalm 40 / 'A Body You Have Prepared' → Incarnation for Sacrifice ## OT Story — Psalm 40:6-8 'Sacrifice and offering you did not desire, but a body you have prepared for me… Behold, I have come to do your will, O God.' The psalmist offers obedience above ritual. ## NT Fulfillment - Hebrews 10:5-10: Applied directly to Christ entering the world. - Philippians 2:7-8: He emptied himself, obedient t…

from.title: Colossians 2 Buried And Raised With Christ
from.body: # Colossians 2: Buried and Raised with Christ ## NT Text — Col 2:11-13 Believers are circumcised with a circumcision made without hands, buried with Christ in baptism, raised with him through faith. Old self stripped, new self received. ## OT Antecedents - **Deut 30:6** — Circumcise your heart. - **Jer 4:4** — Circumcise yourselves to the LORD. - **Ezek 36:26** — New heart and new spirit. ## Share…

to.title: Ezekiel 36 New Heart
to.body: # Ezekiel 36 / New Heart, New Spirit → Born of Water and Spirit ## OT Story — Ezekiel 36:25-27 'I will sprinkle clean water on you… A new heart I will give you, and a new spirit I will put within you. I will remove the heart of stone and give you a heart of flesh.' ## NT Fulfillment - John 3:5-8: Born of water and Spirit. - Titus 3:5: Washing of regeneration and renewal of the Holy Spirit. - 2 Cor…

from.title: Calling Of Twelve
from.body: # Calling of the Twelve ## NT Text — Mark 3:13-19; Luke 6:12-16 Jesus ascends a mountain and appoints twelve apostles. The number is constitutive: a new Israel is being formed around a new lawgiver. ## OT Antecedents - **Gen 49** — Twelve patriarchs. - **Exod 24:4** — Twelve pillars at Sinai. - **Josh 4:1-9** — Twelve stones from the Jordan. ## Shared structure - Twelve representatives - Mountain …

to.title: Showbread Twelve Loaves
to.body: # Bread of the Presence / Twelve Loaves → Christ and His Twelve ## OT Story — Exodus 25:30; Leviticus 24:5-9 Twelve loaves sit on a gold table in the holy place 'before the LORD always.' Priests eat them weekly in the holy place. ## NT Fulfillment - John 6:35: I am the bread of life. - 1 Corinthians 10:17: We who are many are one bread, one body. - Mark 2:25-26: David's eating the showbread antici…

from.title: Achans Sin Communal
from.body: # Achan's Hidden Sin → Hidden Sin Defiles the Body ## OT Story — Joshua 7 Israel is defeated at Ai because Achan has secretly taken devoted goods. The whole camp is implicated until the sin is exposed and judged. ## NT Fulfillment - 1 Corinthians 5:6-7: A little leaven leavens the whole lump. - Acts 5:1-11: Ananias and Sapphira fall dead at the church's threshold. - Hebrews 12:15: That no root of …

to.title: Bathsheba Uriah Sin
to.body: # David's Sin with Bathsheba → Royal Failure and Atoning Need ## OT Story — 2 Samuel 11 King David, idle in spring war-season, takes Bathsheba; she conceives. To cover it, he orders Uriah's death in battle. The thing he had done displeased the LORD. ## NT Fulfillment - Psalm 51: David's penitential prayer. - 1 John 1:9: If we confess, he is faithful and just to forgive. - Matthew 1:6: Listed in ge…

from.title: 1 Cor 5 Christ Our Passover
from.body: # 1 Cor 5: Christ Our Passover ## NT Text — 1 Cor 5:7-8 Paul calls Christ 'our Passover lamb, sacrificed for us,' and exhorts cleansing of old leaven. Passover and Unleavened Bread become ethical patterns. ## OT Antecedents - **Exod 12** — Passover ordinance. - **Exod 13:6-7** — Unleavened bread for seven days. - **Deut 16:1-8** — Passover-Unleavened Bread combined. ## Shared structure - Lamb slai…

to.title: 1 John 2 Atoning Sacrifice
to.body: # 1 John 2: Atoning Sacrifice ## NT Text — 1 John 2:1-2 If anyone sins we have an advocate with the Father, Jesus Christ the righteous. He is the propitiation for our sins — and for the whole world. ## OT Antecedents - **Lev 16** — Day of Atonement propitiation. - **Isa 53:10** — Soul an offering for sin. - **Ps 32:1-2** — Blessed is he whose sin is covered. ## Shared structure - Advocate - Propit…

from.title: Psalm 23 Shepherd
from.body: # Psalm 23 / The LORD My Shepherd → Christ the Good Shepherd ## OT Story — Psalm 23 'The LORD is my shepherd, I shall not want… he restores my soul… valley of the shadow of death… your rod and staff comfort me… you prepare a table before me.' ## NT Fulfillment - John 10:11: I am the good shepherd; the good shepherd lays down his life. - Revelation 7:17: The Lamb at the center of the throne will sh…

to.title: Psalm 69 Reproaches Fell On Me
to.body: # Psalm 69 / 'Zeal for Your House Has Consumed Me' → Christ's Passion ## OT Story — Psalm 69 The psalmist drowns in deep waters; reproach has broken his heart; they gave him vinegar to drink; zeal for God's house consumes him. ## NT Fulfillment - John 2:17: 'Zeal for your house will consume me' at the temple cleansing. - John 15:25: 'They hated me without cause.' - Romans 15:3: The reproaches of t…

from.title: Crucifixion Between Two Thieves
from.body: # Crucifixion Between Two Thieves ## NT Text — Luke 23:32-43 Jesus is crucified between two criminals, fulfilling Isaiah's 'numbered with the transgressors.' One mocks, one believes — a microcosm of human response. ## OT Antecedents - **Isa 53:12** — Numbered with the transgressors. - **Ps 22:16** — Pierce my hands and feet. - **Zech 13:7** — Strike the shepherd. ## Shared structure - Three crosse…

to.title: Words From Cross I Thirst
to.body: # Word from Cross: I Thirst ## NT Text — John 19:28 Jesus says 'I thirst' to fulfill Scripture. The Bread-of-Life is consumed by thirst that he might quench ours. ## OT Antecedents - **Ps 69:21** — Vinegar for my thirst. - **Ps 22:15** — Tongue cleaves. - **Isa 53:10** — Soul makes offering for sin. ## Shared structure - Thirst expressed - Sour wine offered - Fulfillment formula - Reversal ## Theo…

from.title: Obadiah Day Of The LORD
from.body: # Obadiah / Day of the LORD on Edom → Final Judgment ## OT Story — Obadiah 1:15-21 'The day of the LORD is near upon all the nations… As you have done, it shall be done to you.' The kingdom will be the LORD's. ## NT Fulfillment - Romans 12:19: Vengeance is mine, says the Lord. - Revelation 19:11-21: The rider judges the nations. - Hebrews 12:23: Mount Zion's assembly. ## Shared structure - Justice…

to.title: Day Of The LORD Zephaniah
to.body: # Day of the LORD (Zephaniah) ## The oracle "The great day of YHWH is near… a day of wrath, a day of distress and anguish, a day of ruin and devastation, a day of darkness and gloom, a day of clouds and thick darkness." ## Date / context Zephaniah under Josiah, late 7th c. BC, just before Judah's exile. ## Fulfillment The 586 BC fall of Jerusalem inaugurates; the Dies Irae tradition reads the pass…

from.title: 1 Peter 2 He Bore Our Sins
from.body: # 1 Peter 2: He Bore Our Sins ## NT Text — 1 Pet 2:21-25 Christ left an example; he himself bore our sins in his body on the tree, that we might die to sin and live to righteousness. Isaiah 53 is paraphrased throughout. ## OT Antecedents - **Isa 53:4-6** — He bore our griefs; by his wounds we are healed. - **Isa 53:7** — Silent like a lamb. - **Isa 53:11** — Bear their iniquities. ## Shared struct…

to.title: Coats Of Skin First Sacrifice
to.body: # Coats of Skin → Garments of Salvation ## OT Story — Genesis 3:21 After the fall, Adam and Eve cover themselves with fig leaves. God himself makes garments of skin and clothes them. Implicit in the act is the death of an animal — the first sacrifice and covering. ## NT Fulfillment - Isaiah 61:10: He has clothed me with the garments of salvation, covered me with the robe of righteousness. - Romans…

from.title: New Jerusalem Descending
from.body: # New Jerusalem Descending ## The oracle John sees the holy city, New Jerusalem, coming down out of heaven from God, prepared as a bride; God dwells with humanity, every tear wiped away, no more death, mourning, or pain. ## Date / context Climax of Revelation; Ezekiel's temple vision is a major OT antecedent. ## Fulfillment Awaits consummation; foretasted in the church as the city set on a hill. #…

to.title: Second Coming
to.body: # Second Coming ## The oracle This same Jesus, who was taken up from you into heaven, will come in the same way as you saw him go; he comes with the clouds, every eye will see him, and he will reign visibly. ## Date / context Promised at the ascension (Acts 1) and pervasive across NT. ## Fulfillment Awaits the consummation — the central future event of Christian hope. ## Connects to `[[../Places/J…

from.title: 1 Peter 5 Chief Shepherd
from.body: # 1 Peter 5: Chief Shepherd ## NT Text — 1 Pet 5:1-4 Elders shepherd the flock; when the Chief Shepherd appears, they will receive the unfading crown of glory. Davidic-shepherd typology gathered into Christ. ## OT Antecedents - **Ezek 34:23** — My servant David — one shepherd. - **Ps 23** — The LORD is my shepherd. - **Zech 11:7-17** — Two shepherd-staffs. ## Shared structure - Under-shepherds - C…

to.title: Hebrews 1 Heir Of All Things
to.body: # Hebrews 1: Heir of All Things ## NT Text — Heb 1:1-4 God has spoken in these last days by his Son, whom he appointed heir of all things, through whom also he made the world. Christ as final word and inheritor. ## OT Antecedents - **Ps 2:8** — Ask of me, and I will give you the nations. - **Prov 8:22-31** — Wisdom present at creation. - **Deut 32:8-9** — Inheritance allotted. ## Shared structure …

from.title: Revelation 21 New Jerusalem Descending
from.body: # Revelation 21: New Jerusalem Descending ## NT Text — Rev 21:1-22:5 John sees the new heaven and new earth and the New Jerusalem descending from heaven as a bride adorned. God dwells with men. ## OT Antecedents - **Isa 65:17-25** — New heavens and new earth. - **Ezek 40-48** — Vision of restored temple-city. - **Zech 8:3** — I will dwell in Zion. ## Shared structure - New cosmos - City descending…

to.title: Twelve Apostles Echo Twelve Tribes
to.body: # Twelve Apostles Echo Twelve Tribes ## NT Text — Matt 19:28; Rev 21:14 Jesus promises the Twelve will sit on twelve thrones judging the twelve tribes; Revelation 21 names the foundations of the New Jerusalem after them. Tribal Israel and apostolic Israel meet in the heavenly city. ## OT Antecedents - **Gen 49:28** — Twelve tribes of Israel. - **Exod 28:21** — Twelve stones on the high priest's br…

from.title: Daniel 7 Son Of Man
from.body: # Daniel 7 Son of Man → Jesus' Self-Identification ## OT Story — Daniel 7:9-14 Daniel sees a night vision. Four monstrous beasts arise from the chaotic sea; they represent earthly empires. Then the scene shifts to a heavenly throne room: *"As I looked, thrones were placed, and the **Ancient of Days** took his seat ... the court sat in judgment, and the books were opened ... and behold, with the cl…

to.title: Daniel
to.body: # Daniel Exilic seer in Babylon, recipient of the Son-of-Man vision (Dan 7), and source-text behind much NT apocalyptic. ## Key passages - Daniel 2 — image and stone-cut-without-hands - Daniel 3 — fiery furnace, fourth man - Daniel 6 — lions' den - Daniel 7 — Son of Man before the Ancient of Days - Daniel 9:24-27 — seventy weeks - Matthew 24:15 — Jesus cites Daniel ## Cross-references - `[[../Titl…

from.title: Words From Cross Father Forgive
from.body: # Word from Cross: Father, Forgive Them ## NT Text — Luke 23:34 Jesus intercedes for his crucifiers, echoing the Servant who 'made intercession for transgressors.' ## OT Antecedents - **Isa 53:12** — Intercession for transgressors. - **Num 14:19-20** — Moses intercedes for Israel. - **Gen 50:17** — Joseph forgives brothers. ## Shared structure - Intercession amid suffering - Forgiveness offered - …

to.title: Words From Cross Woman Behold Son
to.body: # Word from Cross: Woman, Behold Your Son ## NT Text — John 19:26-27 Jesus entrusts his mother to the beloved disciple. The new-covenant family is constituted at the cross. ## OT Antecedents - **Gen 3:15** — Woman whose seed crushes serpent. - **Ps 22:9-10** — Mother who bore me. - **Ruth 4:14-17** — Naomi receives son via kinsman-redemption. ## Shared structure - Mother and son - New familial bon…

from.title: Ark Captured And Returned
from.body: # Ark Captured and Returned → Christ Captured, Yet Triumphant ## OT Story — 1 Samuel 4-6 Philistines capture the ark. In their temple, Dagon falls before it and is shattered. Plagues afflict their cities. They send the ark back on a new cart. ## NT Fulfillment - Ephesians 4:8: When he ascended, he led captivity captive. - Colossians 2:15: He disarmed the powers, triumphing over them. - Psalm 68:18…

to.title: David Goliath Champion Substitute
to.body: # David vs. Goliath / Champion → Christ Our Representative ## OT Story — 1 Samuel 17 Goliath taunts Israel for forty days. David, the shepherd-boy, accepts the single-combat challenge. He kills the giant with a stone, beheads him with his own sword. The army stands or falls in the champion. ## NT Fulfillment - Hebrews 2:14: Through death he destroyed the devil who had the power of death. - Romans …

from.title: Pierced Side Blood And Water
from.body: # Pierced Side: Blood and Water ## NT Text — John 19:34-37 A soldier pierces Jesus' side; blood and water flow. John cites Zechariah 12:10. ## OT Antecedents - **Zech 12:10** — They will look on him whom they pierced. - **Exod 17:6** — Water from struck rock. - **Ezek 47:1** — Water from temple. ## Shared structure - Pierced side - Blood and water - Look-and-mourn - Temple-water echo ## Theologica…

to.title: Psalm 69 Reproaches Fell On Me
to.body: # Psalm 69 / 'Zeal for Your House Has Consumed Me' → Christ's Passion ## OT Story — Psalm 69 The psalmist drowns in deep waters; reproach has broken his heart; they gave him vinegar to drink; zeal for God's house consumes him. ## NT Fulfillment - John 2:17: 'Zeal for your house will consume me' at the temple cleansing. - John 15:25: 'They hated me without cause.' - Romans 15:3: The reproaches of t…

from.title: Psalm 22 Crucifixion
from.body: # Psalm 22 → The Crucifixion ## OT Story — Psalm 22 A Davidic lament that pivots from extreme suffering to vindicated praise. The opening cry — *"My God, my God, why have you forsaken me?"* (22:1) — gives way to a sequence of concrete tortures: - *"All who see me mock me; they make mouths at me, they wag their heads"* (22:7) - *"He trusts in the LORD; let him deliver him!"* (22:8) — the mockers' t…

to.title: Cup Of Cup Of Wrath
to.body: # Cup of the Lord's Wrath ## NT Text — Matt 26:39; Mark 14:36 Jesus prays that the 'cup' pass from him. OT 'cup' imagery is consistently the cup of God's wrath against sin. Christ drinks what his people deserved. ## OT Antecedents - **Isa 51:17** — Cup of his wrath, the bowl of staggering. - **Jer 25:15-29** — Cup of wrath given to the nations. - **Ps 75:8** — Cup with foaming wine. ## Shared stru…

from.title: 1 Peter 3 Baptism Like Flood
from.body: # 1 Peter 3: Baptism Like the Flood ## NT Text — 1 Pet 3:18-22 Eight souls were saved through water in Noah's ark; baptism corresponds to this. The flood typifies the cleansing-and-deliverance of Christian baptism. ## OT Antecedents - **Gen 7-8** — Noah's flood and ark. - **Gen 6:5-8** — Wickedness met by judgment. - **Ezek 14:14** — Noah, Daniel, and Job — paradigmatic righteous. ## Shared struct…

to.title: Crossing Jordan On Dry Ground
to.body: # Crossing the Jordan → Entry into Promised Rest ## OT Story — Joshua 3 The priests carrying the ark step into the Jordan at flood; the waters stand in a heap and Israel crosses on dry ground into the land. ## NT Fulfillment - Romans 6:3-4: Baptized into Christ's death, raised to walk in newness. - Hebrews 4:8-11: Joshua did not give them final rest; a Sabbath remains. - Matthew 3:13-17: Jesus' ba…

from.title: Pauls Defense Before Felix
from.body: # Paul's Defense Before Felix ## NT Text — Acts 24 Paul defends himself before Felix, speaking of righteousness, self-control, and the coming judgment. Felix is alarmed and dismisses him. ## OT Antecedents - **Dan 5** — Belshazzar trembles before the writing on the wall. - **Esth 6** — King unable to sleep before reversal. - **Ezek 33** — Watchman warning. ## Shared structure - Imprisoned witness …

to.title: Philippian Jailer Conversion
to.body: # Philippian Jailer Conversion ## NT Text — Acts 16:25-34 An earthquake frees the apostles; the jailer, prevented from suicide, asks 'what must I do to be saved?' He believes and is baptized that very night. ## OT Antecedents - **Exod 12:29-30** — Midnight deliverance from Egypt. - **Ps 107:14** — He brought them out of darkness. - **Isa 42:7** — Bring out the prisoners. ## Shared structure - Midn…

from.title: Vine Throughout Scripture
from.body: # Vine Throughout Scripture ## NT Text — John 15 Israel as vine in Psalm 80 and Isaiah 5 — disappointing fruit. Christ as the True Vine, with believers as branches abiding in him. ## OT Antecedents - **Ps 80:8-16** — Vine brought out of Egypt. - **Isa 5:1-7** — Vineyard of the LORD. - **Jer 2:21** — Choice vine turned degenerate. - **Hos 10:1** — Israel a luxuriant vine. ## Shared structure - Plan…

to.title: Water Throughout Scripture
to.body: # Water Throughout Scripture ## NT Text — John 4; John 7; Rev 22 Creation's waters, flood, Red Sea, wilderness rocks, Jordan, the Samaritan well, baptism, the river of life — water marks judgment and life. ## OT Antecedents - **Gen 1:2** — Spirit hovering over waters. - **Exod 14** — Red Sea passage. - **Ezek 47** — River from the temple. ## Shared structure - Chaos-water - Judgment-water - Delive…

from.title: Ezekiel 34 Shepherds Of Israel
from.body: # False Shepherds Condemned / God Will Shepherd → Christ the Good Shepherd ## OT Story — Ezekiel 34 Woe to the shepherds of Israel who feed themselves and not the flock. 'I myself will seek out my sheep… I will set up one shepherd, my servant David.' ## NT Fulfillment - John 10:11: I am the good shepherd. - 1 Peter 5:1-4: Chief Shepherd. - Matthew 9:36: Compassion on the crowds — sheep without a s…

to.title: Micah Ruler From Old
to.body: # Micah 5 / Ruler From Old → Eternal Christ ## OT Story — Micah 5:2-5 'His goings forth are from of old, from ancient of days… He shall stand and shepherd his flock… And he shall be their peace.' ## NT Fulfillment - John 1:1: In the beginning was the Word. - Hebrews 13:8: Jesus Christ the same yesterday, today, and forever. - Ephesians 2:14: He himself is our peace. ## Shared structure - Pre-exist…

from.title: Darkness Over Land
from.body: # Darkness Over the Land ## NT Text — Matt 27:45 Darkness covers the land from noon to three. The cosmic sign echoes the ninth Egyptian plague and Amos's day-of-the-Lord. ## OT Antecedents - **Exod 10:21-23** — Three days darkness over Egypt. - **Amos 8:9** — Sun goes down at noon. - **Joel 2:31** — Sun turned to darkness. ## Shared structure - Daylight extinguished - Cosmic mourning - Plague echo…

to.title: Sun Stands Still
to.body: # Sun Stands Still for Joshua → Day That Never Ends ## OT Story — Joshua 10:12-14 At Joshua's prayer, the sun stands still over Gibeon and the moon over Aijalon. There was no day like it before or since — the LORD fought for Israel. ## NT Fulfillment - Revelation 22:5: No need of sun, for the Lord God is their light. - Habakkuk 3:11: Sun and moon stood still. - Isaiah 60:19-20: Your sun shall no m…

from.title: Mountain Throughout Scripture
from.body: # Mountain Throughout Scripture ## NT Text — Heb 12; Matt 5; Rev 21 Mountains structure the canon: Eden's high garden, Moriah, Sinai, Zion, the Mount of Transfiguration, Mount of Olives, the heavenly Mount Zion. ## OT Antecedents - **Gen 22** — Moriah. - **Exod 19** — Sinai. - **2 Sam 5:7** — Zion. - **Ezek 28:14** — Holy mountain of God. ## Shared structure - Ascent - Theophany - Covenant - Sacri…

to.title: Wine Throughout Scripture
to.body: # Wine Throughout Scripture ## NT Text — John 2; Matt 26 Noah's vineyard, Melchizedek's wine, Passover cups, Isaiah's wine-feast, Cana's water-into-wine, the cup of the new covenant, the cup of wrath — wine threads the canon. ## OT Antecedents - **Gen 9:20** — Noah's vineyard. - **Gen 14:18** — Melchizedek's bread and wine. - **Isa 25:6** — Aged wine on the mountain. - **Jer 25:15** — Cup of wrath…

from.body: # Psalm 23 / The LORD My Shepherd → Christ the Good Shepherd ## OT Story — Psalm 23 'The LORD is my shepherd, I shall not want… he restores my soul… valley of the shadow of death… your rod and staff comfort me… you prepare a table before me.' ## NT Fulfillment - John 10:11: I am the good shepherd; the good shepherd lays down his life. - Revelation 7:17: The Lamb at the center of the throne will sh…

to.title: Zephaniah King In Midst
to.body: # Zephaniah 3 / The King in Your Midst → Christ Dwelling, Singing Over Us ## OT Story — Zephaniah 3:14-17 'Sing aloud, O daughter of Zion! The King of Israel, the LORD, is in your midst… He will rejoice over you with gladness; he will quiet you by his love; he will exult over you with loud singing.' ## NT Fulfillment - John 1:14: The Word became flesh and dwelt among us. - Matthew 1:23: God with u…

from.title: David Goliath
from.body: # David vs. Goliath → Christ as Champion-Substitute A typology not explicitly named in the NT but **structurally identical** to how the NT describes Christ's victory over death and the powers. to.title: Esther Intercessor

from.title: Passover
from.body: # Passover ## What it is The foundational redemption festival on the 14th of Nisan commemorating Israel's deliverance from Egypt through the blood of an unblemished lamb applied to the doorposts, sparing the firstborn from the destroyer. ## Key elements - Unblemished male lamb, one year old - Blood on doorposts and lintel - Roasted whole, eaten in haste with bitter herbs - Bones not broken - Memor…

to.title: Purim
to.body: # Purim ## What it is The two-day festival on the 14th and 15th of Adar commemorating the deliverance of the Jews in Persia from Haman's genocidal decree, instituted by Mordecai and Esther rather than Mosaic command. ## Key elements - Named for "lots" (purim) cast by Haman - Feasting and gladness - Sending portions to neighbors - Gifts to the poor - Public reading of the scroll of Esther ## NT ful…

from.title: Barren Fig Tree
from.body: # The Barren Fig Tree ## What happens A vineyard owner orders a barren fig tree cut down after three fruitless years; the vinedresser pleads for one more year of digging and dunging. ## Typological significance Patience under intercession — judgment delayed by mediator's plea. Three fruitless years parallel Jesus' public ministry; the cursed fig tree in Holy Week is this parable enacted. ## Connec…

to.title: True Vine Discourse
to.body: # The True Vine Discourse ## What happens Jesus declares 'I am the true vine, my Father is the vinedresser.' Branches abiding in Him bear much fruit; those that do not are pruned away and burned. ## Typological significance Israel as failed vine (Psalm 80, Isaiah 5) replaced by Christ as the true vine — believers as branches in Him. Isaiah 53 is paraphrased throughout. ## OT Antecedents - **Isa 53:4-6** — He bore our griefs; by his wounds we are healed. - **Isa 53:7** — Silent like a lamb. - **Isa 53:11** — Bear their iniquities. ## Shared struct…

to.title: Two Goats Yom Kippur
to.body: # Two Goats of Atonement → Christ's Death and Bearing-Away ## OT Story — Leviticus 16:7-22 On Yom Kippur, two goats: one slaughtered as sin offering, its blood taken behind the veil; the other (the scapegoat) bears confessed sins into the wilderness, never to return. ## NT Fulfillment - Hebrews 9:11-14: Christ entered the holy places by his own blood. - Hebrews 10:11-14: One offering for sins fore…

from.title: 1 Cor 15 Last Adam
from.body: # 1 Cor 15: Last Adam ## NT Text — 1 Cor 15:45 Christ is the 'last Adam' who became life-giving spirit. The first man was from the earth; the second from heaven. ## OT Antecedents - **Gen 2:7** — Adam became a living being. - **Ps 8** — Son of man crowned with glory. - **Isa 53:11** — Bear their iniquities. ## Shared structure - Two Adams - First/last - Earthly/heavenly - Living being/life-giving …

to.title: Colossians 1 Cosmic Christ
to.body: # Colossians 1: Cosmic Christ ## NT Text — Col 1:15-20 Christ is the image of God, firstborn over creation; in him all things hold together. The hymn weaves Genesis, Proverbs 8 wisdom, and reconciliation. ## OT Antecedents - **Gen 1** — Creator of all things. - **Prov 8:22-31** — Wisdom present at creation. - **Ps 89:27** — Firstborn, highest of kings. ## Shared structure - Image of God - Pre-exis…

from.title: Psalm 118 Hosanna
from.body: # Psalm 118 / Hosanna → Triumphal Entry ## OT Story — Psalm 118:25-26 'Save us, we pray, O LORD! Blessed is he who comes in the name of the LORD!' Sung at pilgrimage feasts as Israel ascends to Jerusalem. ## NT Fulfillment - Matthew 21:9: 'Hosanna to the Son of David! Blessed is he who comes…' - John 12:13: Palm branches and the same cry. - Matthew 23:39: 'You will not see me again until you say…'…

to.title: Psalm 45 Wedding Of King
to.body: # Psalm 45 / Royal Wedding → Marriage of the Lamb ## OT Story — Psalm 45 A royal wedding song. The king's throne is forever; his garments are fragrant; the bride is beautiful in her chambers. 'Forget your people; the king will desire your beauty.' ## NT Fulfillment - Hebrews 1:8-9: 'Your throne, O God' applied directly to the Son. - Ephesians 5:25-32: The mystery of marriage refers to Christ and t…

from.title: Cities Of Refuge
from.body: # Cities of Refuge → Christ as Refuge ## OT Story — Numbers 35:9-34 Six cities are designated as refuges where one who has killed unintentionally may flee from the avenger of blood. He stays until the death of the high priest, then returns home free. ## NT Fulfillment - Hebrews 6:18: We have fled to take hold of the hope set before us. - Romans 8:1: No condemnation for those in Christ. - Hebrews 7…

to.title: Noahs Ark Salvation Through Judgment
to.body: # Noah's Ark / Salvation-Through-Judgment → Refuge in Christ ## OT Story — Genesis 6:13-22; 7:23 God commands Noah to build an ark of gopher wood pitched within and without. All who enter are saved through the very judgment that destroys the world. The door is shut by God himself (Gen 7:16). ## NT Fulfillment - Hebrews 11:7: Noah, warned by God, prepared an ark for the salvation of his household. …

from.title: Jonah Three Days
from.body: # Jonah Three Days in the Fish → Three Days in the Tomb This typology is **the only one Jesus himself names explicitly as a sign**. It is therefore exceptionally load-bearing — if any typology is methodologically validated by canonical scripture, this one is. ## OT Story — Jonah 1-2 God calls Jonah to preach repentance to Nineveh, the capital of Israel's enemy Assyria. Jonah flees by ship in the o…

to.title: Psalm 22 Crucifixion
to.body: # Psalm 22 → The Crucifixion ## OT Story — Psalm 22 A Davidic lament that pivots from extreme suffering to vindicated praise. The opening cry — *"My God, my God, why have you forsaken me?"* (22:1) — gives way to a sequence of concrete tortures: - *"All who see me mock me; they make mouths at me, they wag their heads"* (22:7) - *"He trusts in the LORD; let him deliver him!"* (22:8) — the mockers' t…

from.title: Esther Intercessor
from.body: # Esther → Christ as Intercessor ## OT Story — Esther 4-8 Haman, the king's vizier, has secured a decree to annihilate the Jews throughout the Persian empire (Esth 3:13). Mordecai sends word to Esther — now queen — asking her to plead for her people. The problem: anyone who approaches the king unsummoned faces death *"unless the king holds out the golden scepter"* (Esth 4:11). Mordecai's challenge…

to.title: Garden Eden Cherubim
to.body: # Eden's Cherubim → Christ as the Way Back ## OT Story — Genesis 3:22-24 After the fall, God says: *"Behold, the man has become like one of us in knowing good and evil. Now, lest he reach out his hand and take also of the tree of life and eat, and live forever..."* (Gen 3:22). He drives the man out, and *"at the east of the garden of Eden he placed the **cherubim** and a **flaming sword** that tur…

from.title: Daniel 2 Stone Cut Without Hands
from.body: # Stone Cut Without Hands → Kingdom That Fills the Earth ## OT Story — Daniel 2:31-45 Nebuchadnezzar dreams of a colossus shattered by a stone cut without hands, which becomes a mountain filling the earth. The God of heaven sets up an everlasting kingdom. ## NT Fulfillment - Acts 4:11: The stone rejected. - Luke 20:17-18: The stone falls and crushes. - Matthew 13:31-32: Kingdom grows like a tree. …

to.title: Daniel 6 Lions Den
to.body: # Daniel in the Lions' Den → Sealed Tomb and Vindication ## OT Story — Daniel 6 Daniel prays openly; he is cast to the lions; the stone sealed with the king's signet. At dawn the king finds him alive; God shut the lions' mouths. The accusers are devoured. ## NT Fulfillment - Hebrews 11:33: By faith they stopped the mouths of lions. - 2 Timothy 4:17: I was rescued from the lion's mouth. - Matthew 2…

from.title: Apocalypse Of Weeks Enoch
from.body: # Apocalypse of Weeks → Periodized History and Final Age ## OT Story — 1 Enoch 93; 91:11-17 History is divided into ten 'weeks'; the seventh sees apostasy and the chosen of the eternal plant; later weeks bring judgment and new creation. ## NT Fulfillment - Matthew 24:14: This gospel will be preached throughout the world, and then the end. - 2 Peter 3:13: New heavens and new earth. - Galatians 4:4:…

to.title: Enoch Walking With God
to.body: # Enoch Walking With God → Translation and the Coming Lord ## OT Story — Genesis 5:21-24 In a genealogy marked by the refrain "and he died," one name breaks the pattern: Enoch "walked with God, and he was not, for God took him." Seventh from Adam, he is removed from death's tally by direct fellowship with God. ## NT Fulfillment - Hebrews 11:5-6: Enoch was "taken up so that he should not see death"…

from.title: Council Of Jerusalem
from.body: # Council of Jerusalem ## NT Text — Acts 15 The apostles decide Gentiles need not be circumcised. James cites Amos 9:11-12: the rebuilt tabernacle of David includes the nations. ## OT Antecedents - **Amos 9:11-12** — Rebuild David's fallen tent — nations called by my name. - **Isa 2:2-4** — Nations stream to Zion. - **Gen 17** — Covenant of circumcision. ## Shared structure - Apostolic deliberatio…

to.title: Healing At Beautiful Gate
to.body: # Healing at the Beautiful Gate ## NT Text — Acts 3:1-10 Peter heals a lame man at the temple gate. The healing fulfills Isaiah 35:6 ('the lame shall leap') and enacts kingdom restoration at the temple's threshold. ## OT Antecedents - **Isa 35:6** — Then shall the lame leap like a deer. - **Mic 4:6-7** — I will assemble the lame. - **2 Sam 5:8** — David's saying about the lame. ## Shared structure…

from.title: Jacobs Stone Pillow
from.body: # Jacob's Stone Pillow / Anointed Pillar → Christ the Cornerstone ## OT Story — Genesis 28:10-22 Fleeing alone, Jacob sleeps with a stone for a pillow and dreams of a ladder to heaven. Waking, he anoints the stone with oil, names the place Bethel ('house of God'), and vows. ## NT Fulfillment - John 1:51: Jesus to Nathanael — you will see heaven opened and angels ascending and descending on the Son…

to.title: Mountain Throughout Scripture
to.body: # Mountain Throughout Scripture ## NT Text — Heb 12; Matt 5; Rev 21 Mountains structure the canon: Eden's high garden, Moriah, Sinai, Zion, the Mount of Transfiguration, Mount of Olives, the heavenly Mount Zion. ## OT Antecedents - **Gen 22** — Moriah. - **Exod 19** — Sinai. - **2 Sam 5:7** — Zion. - **Ezek 28:14** — Holy mountain of God. ## Shared structure - Ascent - Theophany - Covenant - Sacri…

from.title: Bones Of Joseph Carried Out
from.body: # Bones of Joseph Carried Out → Hope of Resurrection ## OT Story — Genesis 50:24-26 Dying in Egypt, Joseph commands: 'God will surely visit you; carry up my bones from here.' Moses takes the bones at the exodus; Joshua buries them in the land. ## NT Fulfillment - Hebrews 11:22: By faith Joseph spoke of the exodus and gave instructions concerning his bones. - Ezekiel 37: Dry bones live by the Spiri…

to.title: Job My Redeemer Lives
to.body: # Job / 'My Redeemer Lives' → Resurrection Hope ## OT Story — Job 19:25-27 'I know that my Redeemer lives, and at the last he will stand upon the earth. After my skin has been thus destroyed, yet in my flesh I shall see God.' ## NT Fulfillment - John 11:25: I am the resurrection and the life. - 1 Corinthians 15:20: Christ has been raised, the firstfruits. - Revelation 1:18: I died, and behold I am…

from.title: Abraham Isaac
from.body: # Abraham / Isaac → The Crucifixion ## OT Story — Genesis 22 God commands Abraham: *"Take your son, your only son, whom you love — Isaac — and go to the region of Moriah. Sacrifice him there as a burnt offering on a mountain I will show you."* (Gen 22:2) Abraham obeys. Isaac carries the wood for his own sacrifice up the mountain. Isaac asks, *"Father, where is the lamb?"* Abraham answers, *"God hi…

to.title: Genesis 5 Acrostic
to.body: # Genesis 5 — The Gospel Hidden in the Genealogy from Adam to Noah This is the canonical example of `[[../Motifs/Gospel-In-Narrative]]`. The genealogy in Genesis 5 lists ten patriarchs from Adam to Noah. **When their Hebrew names are translated by their literal meanings, the resulting sequence forms a coherent sentence proclaiming the gospel.** This is also the most contested typology in this seed…

from.title: 1 John 5 Three That Testify
from.body: # 1 John 5: Three That Testify ## NT Text — 1 John 5:6-9 There are three that testify: the Spirit, the water, and the blood. The triple witness confirms Jesus as Son of God. ## OT Antecedents - **Deut 19:15** — Two or three witnesses establish a matter. - **Num 35:30** — On the testimony of two witnesses a man shall die. - **Isa 43:10** — You are my witnesses, says the LORD. ## Shared structure - …

to.title: Water Throughout Scripture
to.body: # Water Throughout Scripture ## NT Text — John 4; John 7; Rev 22 Creation's waters, flood, Red Sea, wilderness rocks, Jordan, the Samaritan well, baptism, the river of life — water marks judgment and life. ## OT Antecedents - **Gen 1:2** — Spirit hovering over waters. - **Exod 14** — Red Sea passage. - **Ezek 47** — River from the temple. ## Shared structure - Chaos-water - Judgment-water - Delive…

from.title: Stricken Shepherd
from.body: # Stricken Shepherd ## The oracle "Awake, O sword, against my shepherd, against the man who stands next to me… strike the shepherd, and the sheep will be scattered." ## Date / context Zechariah, post-exilic Jerusalem, late 6th c. BC. ## Fulfillment Jesus quotes this on the night of his arrest to predict the disciples' flight (Matthew 26:31; Mark 14:27). ## Connects to `[[../Titles/Good-Shepherd]]`…

to.title: Wolf And Lamb
to.body: # Wolf and Lamb ## The oracle "The wolf shall dwell with the lamb… and a little child shall lead them. They shall not hurt or destroy in all my holy mountain." ## Date / context Isaiah's messianic-restoration vision. ## Fulfillment Awaits the consummation of the kingdom in the new creation; in the meantime read as the trajectory of peace under the Messiah's reign. ## Connects to `[[../Symbols/Lamb…

to.title: Hebrews 9 Once For All
to.body: # Hebrews 9: Once for All ## NT Text — Heb 9:11-14, 24-28 Christ entered the heavenly sanctuary once for all by his own blood. Annual atonement is superseded by single, eternal redemption. ## OT Antecedents - **Lev 16** — Day of Atonement — annual. - **Exod 26:33** — Veil before the most-holy. - **Zech 9:11** — Blood of the covenant. ## Shared structure - Heavenly sanctuary - Once-for-all entry - …
